description: Use this API to run the last known power flow solution. A power flow solution is ‘know’ if the solution method and parameters are contained within the SAV or RAW file. It is useful for solving a case from an outside source for which there is no documentation on solution methods. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = runlastsolution()

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
